# cgImage(options:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a full resolution CGImage of the representation.

## Declaration

```swift
func cgImage(options: [AnyHashable : Any]! = [:]) -> Unmanaged<CGImage>!
```

## Parameters

- **options**: A dictionary of options as described for [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ImageIO/CGImageSourceCreateWithData(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ImageIO/CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(_:_:)].

## Return Value

A full resolution CGImage of the representation.

## Discussion

This method provides a convenient way to obtain a CGImage representation of an asset. This method returns the biggest, best representation available.



## Getting Image Representations

- **fullResolutionImage()**: Returns a CGImage representation of the asset.
- **fullScreenImage()**: Returns a CGImage of the representation that is appropriate for displaying full screen.
